chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-240 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 1423/13 2. For hearing of main case 15.10.2020 Mr. Irfan Ahmed Qureshi advocate for petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. along with Syed Zakir Ali Shah, Regional Director, Sindh Katchi Abadi Shaheed Benazirabad, and Mureed Ali Siyal, Mukhtiarkar Nawabshah. ---- This matter pertains to regularization of a Katchi Abadi i.e. village Magsi as per Resolution of the Chairman, Municipal Committee Nawabshah dated 07.03.1987; having resolution number is 480. Today, learned counsel for the petitioners has relied upon a statement along with which a notification of 02.03.2020 is filed thereby regularizing the Katchi Abadi having Magsi Goth spread over an area of 04-00 acres having graveyard at north, society at south, mosque at east and private land at west. The notification is shown to the official of the Katchi Abadi who has conceded that this has been issued as required under the law. This being the position, the petitioners are satisfied as long as this notification exists in law. In case, the Katchi Abadi practically exceeds beyond 04-00 acres the officials shall take immediate action and submit compliance report. Even otherwise, a report be filed towards the above compliance within two weeks. An affidavit be filed that the Magsi Goth is not exceeding 04:00 acres within two weeks. Petition is disposed of accordingly along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
